title: The One Where Chandler Gets Caught

lines.speaker: Produced by
lines.text: Wendy Knoller

lines.speaker: Flashback clips transcribed by
lines.text: Guineapig, Dan Silverstein, Ruth Curran, Eric Aasen and Mindy Mattingly Phillips, and compiled by Eleonora.
Final check by Kim
Central Perk. Everybody's sitting on the couch and Monica is eating a chunk of cake.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (really excited) Mmh... this cake is amazing!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: My God, get a room!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I would get a room with this cake. I think I could show this cake a good time!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: If you had to, what would you give up, food or sex?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (with no hesitation) Sex!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (looking at her) Seriously, answer faster!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, I'm sorry honey, you know, but when she said "sex" I wasn't thinking about "sex with you"!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (to Phoebe) It's like a giant hug.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ross, how about you. What would you give up, sex or food?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Food.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ok, how about... uhm... sex or dinosaurs?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh my God. It's like Sophie's Choice.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh God. What about you, Joe? What would you give up, sex or food?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uhm... oh... I don't know, it's too hard.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, you gotta pick one!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh... food. No, sex. Food! Sex! Food! Se-I don't know! Good God, I don't know, I want girls on bread!
OPENING CREDITS
Central Perk. Rachel and Phoebe are looking at some photos and they're sitting next to the window.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You gotta see these latest pictures of Emma.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, how cute!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, she looks just like a little doll!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, no, no. That is a doll.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, thank God, 'cause that thing's really creepy! (looking outside the window) Look, there's Chandler. (he's on the street, talking to a woman)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh. Who is the blonde, she's pretty.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: OH! He's having an affair.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: He's not having an affair!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You know, I'm always right about these things.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, you're not! Last week you thought Ross was trying to kill you!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, I'm sorry but it's hard to believe that anyone would tell a story that dull just to tell it! (looking outside) See, there's something going on with them. Look, he's getting into the car with her!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, that doesn't mean anything.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh yeah? Well, let's see. (she takes her mobile phone) Ok, duck down. (they both get down to hide themselves. Phoebe calls Chandler)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (picking up the phone) Hello.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, hi Chandler. It's Phoebe. Uhm... I know that Monica is working today so...(back to Central Perk) ...I was wondering if you want to come to the movies with me and Rachel.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, uhm... I have to work too. Yeah, I'm stuck at the office all day.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (shocked) Oh, well, it's a shame that you-that you miss the movie 'cause we were gonna see, you know, either "Liar, Liar" or "Betrayal", or... "An Affair To Remember".

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Those are all really old!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ok, then maybe it'll be, uhm...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (whispering) "Dude, Where's My Car?"

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (glancing at her) What?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: They're in a caaar...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (to Chandler at the phone) Okay, we-we'll talk to you later. Okay, bye.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Geez!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ok. Quick. We gotta find a cab and follow them.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, yeah, ok. Let me just grab my night vision goggles and my stun gun.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (patting her bag) I got them!
Monica's apartment. Chandler enters the door.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey! You smell like perfume and cigarettes.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I was in the car with Nancy all day.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Nancy doesn't smoke!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, at least the perfume is not mine, be thankful for that!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So? What do you think of the house?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It's perfect. It's everything we've been looking for.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Isn't it? Then what about the amazing wainscotting and the crown molding and the dormer windows in the attic?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: And the wiggle wharms and the zip zorps? (pause) What were the things you said?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Don't you love the huge yard?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: And the fireplace in the bedroom.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And Nancy said that it's really under price, because the guy lost his job and has to move in with his parents!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: This is bringing out a lovely color in you!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So? Do you think we should get it?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don't know. What do you think?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I think we should.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I do too.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: This is huge!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How bad you wanna smoke, right now.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don't know what you mean, giant talking cigarette! Oh, by the way, Phoebe called just as I was getting into Nancy's car, so if she asks you, I was at work all day.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Gotcha. When do we tell them about this?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We don't. Not until it's a hundred percent. I mean, why upset everybody over nothing.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay. Right. Oh my God that is gonna be so hard.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know. Gooooood luck with it.
Joey's apartment. Everybody except Monica and Chandler is there.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I just can't see Chandler cheating!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm telling you guys, we followed them out to a house in Westchester, the went in for like forty-five minutes and then they came out looking pretty happy!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Chandler? Forty-five minutes? Well, something is not right. I just can't believe he would do this to Monica!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I know, and with the baby coming?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So, should we tell her?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I don't know. Phoebe, if one of us saw Mike with another woman would you want us to tell you?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Why? Who'd you seen him with?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No one, I'm just saying if... (Phoebe starts pinching him in his neck)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: TELL ME WHAT YOU KNOW!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (yelling in pain) I know nothing! Mike's a great guy, it was hypothetical!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: All right. (she releases him). He is a good guy. You're right, he wouldn't cheat.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Believe me, if I did see with someone, there's no way I... (Phoebe starts pinching him again)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: WHO DID YOU SEE HIM WITH?
Monica's apartment. Monica is cleaning with a vacuum and then she cleans it with a dust buster. The guys enter the room.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, look at her, so happy!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: If only there were a smaller one to clean this one!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, is uhm... is Chandler here?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, he's picking up dinner, why, what's up?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, look, whatever happens, we're here for you and we love you.
Monica (puzzled): All right...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: We think Chandler might be having an affair.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Phoebe and I saw Chandler with a blonde woman today outside on the street and then we followed them to a house in Westchester.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: They went in together. So sorry.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God! Oh my God that's awful! What did you think of the house?
they all look confused and sorry for her

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (walking towards her to hold her and support her) Monica, you understand what we are saying, right?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, sure... uhm, I'm devastated, obviously... (to the rest) Did you think the neighborhood was homey? (Chandler enters)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to Chandler) You son of a bitch!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Is it me, or have the greetings gone downhill around here?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (goes to Chandler) Phoebe and Rachel saw you with Nancy today and... em... they think you're having an affair.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Who's Nancy?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What's going on?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (turns to them) Ok, alright, you guys, you'd better sit down, this is pretty big.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah (motions them to sit and they do) I'm not having an affair. Nancy is our realtor.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I knew he couldn't be with a woman for 45 minutes!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Why do you have a realtor?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Uhm, she has been showing us houses outside of the city.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (clearly shocked) What?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Are you serious?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: When we found out that we're gonna get this baby, Chandler and I started talking and we decided that we didn't want to raise a kid in the city.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So you're gonna move?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh my God.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Shouldn't we all vote on stuff like this?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What is wrong with raising a kid in the city? I'm doing it, Ross is doing it, Sarah Jessica Parker is doing it!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And that's great for you guys, but we want a lawn and a swingset...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: ...and a street where our kids can ride their bikes and maybe an ice-cream truck can go by.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (sarcastic) So you wanna buy a house in the 50's?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Have you thought about what you would be giving up? You can't move out of the city, what if you want Chinese food at 5am? Or a fake Rolex that breaks as soon as it rains or an Asian hooker sent right to your door?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You know what, if you wanna look for a house, that's okay.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, no, it's not, don't listen to him! (to Ross) I'm gonna thump you! (points his fist at him)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (to Joey) It's ok, because they have to get it out of their system, okay (back to Mon and Chan), but you're going to realize, this is the only place, you wanna be.
pause before Monica and Chandler speak, they look like they are looking for the right words

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Actually, we already found a house we love.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And about an hour ago, we made an offer.
All the friends looked shocked and confused. There is a long silence.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Bet you wish I was having an affair now, huh?
TIME LAPSE

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You put an offer on a house?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (smiling) It's so sweet. It really is. It has this big yard that leads down to this stream and then there's these old maple trees... (gets cut off)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Wha..? Again with the nature, what are you? Beavers?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know this is really hard and we're really sorry.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Is this because I come over here without knocking and eat your food? (Walks towards the fridge) Because I can stop doing that, (looks at the fridge) I really, really think I can!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (goes towards Joey) You know that's not the reason Joe. (Joey hugs him and after, he takes something from the fridge and puts it in his mouth. He goes back to where he was standing before)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We think if you saw it, you'd understand. I mean you guys were there. (Points to Rachel and Phoebe) It is beautiful, isn't it?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah it is.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What the hell are you doin'?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, it is, all right? When we were out there today, all I kept thinking was: I can't believe Chandler is screwing this woman, but MAN this would be a nice place to live!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, but so is this.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, I mean, if you moved there, you have to leave here. I mean, how can you leave this place?
[We fade to some flashback scenes.]
from 1.01 - "The One Where Monica Gets a New Roommate - The Pilot"

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (talking on the phone) C'mon Daddy, listen to me! All of my life, everyone has always told me, 'You're a shoe! You're a shoe, you're a shoe, you're a shoe!'. And today I just stopped and I said, 'What if I don't wanna be a shoe? What if I wanna be a- a purse, y'know? Or a- or a hat! No, I don't want you to buy me a hat, I'm saying that I am a ha- It's a metaphor, Daddy!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You can see where he'd have trouble.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well maybe I'll just stay here with Monica.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, I guess we've established who's staying here with Monica...
from 1.18 - "The One With All the Poker"

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That money is mine, Green!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You're fly is open, Geller!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You guys, you know what I just realized? 'Joker' is 'poker' with a 'J.' Coincidence?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey, that's...'joincidence' with a 'C'!
from 1.07 - "The One With The Blackout"

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: [looking outside the window] Eww, look. Ugly Naked Guy lit a bunch of candles.
[They all look at the window, grossed out, then flinch in pain.]

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ow, that had to hurt!
from 3.09 - "The One With All the Football"

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey, it's your Thanksgiving too, y'know, instead of watching football, you could help.

lines.speaker: The Guys
lines.text: We will. (they don't move)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, Rachel, you wanna put the marshmallows in concentric circles.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No Mon, you want to put them in concentric circles. I want to do this.
Rachel sticks a marshmallow into Monica's nose. Monica takes it out of her nose by closing one nostril, and blowing.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Every year.
from 5.08 - "The One With the Thanksgiving Flashbacks"

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (he has a turkey on his head) It's stuck!!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (walks him to the kitchen) Easy. Step. How did it get on?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I put it on to scare Chandler!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God! Monica's gonna totally freak out!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It smells really bad in here.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, of course it smells really bad. You have your head inside a turkey's ass!
They hear Monica trying to unlock the door. So Phoebe quickly pushes his head down onto the table to make it look like the turkey is just sitting on a platter and not stuck on Joey's head.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, did you get the turkey bast-Oh my God! Oh my God! (She sees someone is stuck in the turkey.) Who is that?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It's Joey.
from 4.12 - "The one With the Embryos"

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I got it! How about, if we win, they have to get rid of the rooster?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oooohh that's interesting.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: If you win, we give up the birds.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (shocked) Dah!! (Chandler motions for him to calm down.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But if we win, we get your apartment.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oooooh!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Deal!
TIME LAPSE

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What was Monica's nickname when she was a field hockey goalie?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Big fat goalie.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Correct. Rachel claims this is her favorite movie...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Dangerous Liaisons.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Correct. Her actual favorite movie is...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Weekend at Bernie's.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Monica categorizes her towels. How many categories are there?
They both confer

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Everyday use.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Fancy.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Guest.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Fancy guest.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Two seconds...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uhh, 11!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: 11, unbelievable, 11 is correct. (The guys celebrate.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (to the girls) Chandler was how old when he first touched a girl's breast?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Thanks man.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Joey had an imaginary childhood friend. His name was?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Maurice.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Correct, his profession was?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Space cowboy!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Correct! What is Chandler Bing's job?
The girls are stumped

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ow...Oh Gosh!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: 10 seconds, you need this or you lose the game.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It's umm, it has something to do with transponding.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh-oh-oh, he's a transponce-transpondster!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's not even a word!
Ross stops the clock, signifying the end of the lightning round.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: NOOOOOOOOO!!!!!
TIME LAPSE
The door opens and Joey and Chandler ride in on the big, fake dog in triumph

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Y'know what, you are mean boys, who are just being mean!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, don't get mad at us! No one forced you to raise the stakes!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That is not true. She did! She forced me!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, we would still be living here if hadn't gotten the question wrong!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well it stupid, unfair question!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Don't blame the questions!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Would you all stop yelling in our apartment! You are ruining moving day for us!
from 5.15 - "The One With The Girl Who Hits Joey"

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Chandler!!! Chandler!!! (He opens the door to the apartment but is stopped by the chain; Chandler and Monica quickly stop making out and try to get dressed.) Chandler, I saw what you were doing through the window! Chandler, I saw what you were doing to my sister! Now get out here!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (To Monica) Wow! Listen, we had a good run. You know, what was it? Four? Five months? I mean, that's more than most people have in a lifetime! So, good-bye, take care, bye-bye then! (He kisses her and starts to climb out the balcony window)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (She opens the door.) Hey Ross. What's up bro?
Ross spots Chandler and starts chasing him around the kitchen table. Chandler runs and hides behind Monica.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What the hell are doing?!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (running from the guy's apartment with Joey in tow) Hey, what's-what's going on?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, I think, I think Ross knows about me and Monica.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (panicking) Dude! He's right there!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (To Chandler) I thought you were my best friend, this is my sister! My best friend and my sister! I-I cannot believe this!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look, we're not just messing around! I love her. Okay, I'm in love with her.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm so sorry that you had to find out this way. I'm sorry, but iit-t's true, I love him too.
There's a brief pause.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (happily) My best friend and my sister! I cannot believe this. (He hugs them both.)
from 6.06 - "The One On The Last Night"

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, this is the last box of your clothes. I'm just gonna label it, "What were you thinking?"

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Funny, because I was just gonna go across the hall and write that on Chandler.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ok, you guys, I don't mean to make things worse, but umm, I don't want to live with Rachel anymore.

lines.speaker: Monica and Rachel
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You're just so mean to each other! And I don't want to end up like that with Rachel. I still like you!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, Phoebe that's fine because I'm not moving.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Whoa-whoa-whoa, Phoebe you gotta take her! Y'know, I-I-I said some really bad stuff about her, but y'know Rachel has some good qualities that make her a good roommate. She gets tons of catalogs and umm, she'll fold down the pages of the things she thinks that I'd like.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What else?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: When I take a shower, she leaves me little notes on the mirror.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, I do. I-I do, do that.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That's nice. I like having things to read in the bathroom.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: When I fall asleep on the couch after reading, she covers me over with a blanket.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well y'know, I don't want you to be cold.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And when I told her that I was gonna be moving in with Chandler, she was really supportive. (To Rachel) (Starts to cry) You were so great. You made it so easy. And now you have to leave. And I have to live with a boy!! (They both break down in tears.)
TIME LAPSE
Monica closes the door and slowly walks into Rachel's old and now empty room.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (entering) Hey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: She really left.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know. (He kisses her.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No problem roomie. (She turns around and hugs him.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Can I ask you a question?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What the hell is that dog doing here?! (She notices the dog sitting in the living room.)
from 1.09 - "The One Where Underdog Gets Away"

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Little toast here. I know this isn't exactly the kind of Thanksgiving that all of you all planned, but for me, this has been really great, you know, I think because it didn't involve divorce or projectile vomiting. Anyway, I was just thinking, I mean, if you'd gone to Vail, and if you guys'd been with your family, if you didn't have syphilis and stuff, we wouldn't be all together, you know? So I guess what I'm trying to say is that I'm very thankful that all of your Thanksgivings sucked.

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: That's so sweet.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And hey, here's to a lousy Christmas.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: And a crappy New Year.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Here, here!
We're back to the present. Chandler and Monica's. They're all still at the kitchen table.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You can't move. You just... you just can't.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Rachel's right. This is where you guys belong.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, you don't wanna live in Westchester. That's like the worst of the Chesters.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You know, sometimes when I'm alone in my apartment, I look over here and you guys... are just having dinner or... watching TV or something, but... it makes me feel better. And now when I look over, who am I gonna see? The Gottliebs, the Yangs? They don't make me feel so good. (Joey pats Ross on his back)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah. So don't move, okay? Just stay here and... (nods towards Ross) maybe close your blinds at night.
The phone rings and Chandler goes to get it

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hello? It's Nancy, they responded to our offer.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And?
Chandler listens to what Nancy says

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (to Nancy) Okay, thanks... (to Monica) They passed. They said they wouldn't go a penny under the asking price.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We can't afford that.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, there you go.
Chandler and Monica hug

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm really sorry you guys.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah. I'm sorry too. I'm even more sorry that that phone call didn't come before I told you about looking through the window.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, we're gonna let you be alone.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (to Monica) You're gonna be okay?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, we'll be okay.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Love you guys. (he kisses Monica, he, Rachel and Phoebe leave.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You know, I'm really sorry I wasn't more supportive before.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's okay, we understand.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: And about this Nancy thing... If you're not sleeping with her, should I?
Chandler gives Joey her business card, which he eagerly grabs and he leaves.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know there'll be other houses, but it's just so... I love that one so much.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah... Well, it's a good thing we got it then.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We got the house.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I just didn't want to tell you in front of them.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God! My God! We've got the house !?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We're getting the house. (they hug) We're getting the house.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And a baby...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We're growing up.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We sure are.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So who's gonna tell them?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (quickly) Not it!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Not it! Damn it!
COMMERCIAL BREAK
Central Perk. The entire gang is there, and Chandler and Monica are handing out presents.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Rachel, this is yours.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Aah! Why? What are these for?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You'll see.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right, everybody open them!
they all tear off the wrapping paper

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ooh! Oh wow this is so beautiful. (she got a scarf)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! These are the ones I was looking at in the store. (she got earrings)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I love this. (he got a sweater)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: A meatball Sub? Thanks! (he got a meatball sandwich)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Seriously you guys, what's going on? What are these for?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, I didn't know how to tell you before, but... We got the house.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Enjoy!
they both run off, leaving Ross, Phoebe and Rachel stunned.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (speaking with his mouth full, enjoying his sandwich) What did they say?
THE END
